description_long: This is a modern suburban house with a large fenced yard, featuring a mix of flat and gable roof sections. The property includes a driveway with multiple parked cars, a detached garage, and a backyard with a swimming pool and patio furniture. The house exterior is primarily light-colored with some darker roof elements and several large windows, providing ample natural light. Palm trees and other landscaping elements are visible around the perimeter, enhancing the residential feel. The main entryway is accessible from the driveway, and the backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence. The overall layout suggests a spacious, family-oriented home with outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, light-colored suburban house with a fenced yard, pool, driveway, and detached garage, surrounded by landscaping and multiple cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with parked cars, main entryway, fenced yard, and pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard, pool, patio furniture, and the full extent of the fenced area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the garage, back of the house, and the pool area within the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage doors, side landscaping, and a partial view of the pool and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, direct driveway access, and minimal overhang; no porch or columns visible.
